text:
Once upon a time, there was a timid bird who lived in a pine forest. Every dawn he would swooped down the familiar branches. Every evening he'd watch the stars. That was his world.

One rainy afternoon, something unusual fluttered onto his branch. It was a fox. Sly, wise.

"You look lost," said the fox. "What troubles you?"

The bird shuffled nervously. "Just my world. It seems... dull."

The fox chuckled. "Have you ever seen the stars? There is beauty there."

With curiosity piqued, the bird flew closer. One evening he danced beneath a giant pinecone.

That night, they conversed. The fox knew secrets.

"You dream about change," he whispered.

With wonder, the bird dreamed.

His feathers shimmered.


Now he soared.

So lived the bird, forever changed.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
